markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 601. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 601.008 — Violation of Chapter; Offense

(a) A person commits an offense if the person violates a provision of this chapter for which a penalty is not otherwise provided.

(b) An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by:

    (1) a fine not to exceed $500;

    (2) confinement in county jail for a term not to exceed 90 days; or

    (3) both the fine and the confinement.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a

confinement in county jail for a term not to exceed 90 days; or
both the fine and the confinement.
